title: [App] Flamingo/Spoonbill - Connect headset as standalone
scenario: Standalone headset mode shows only headset battery indicator and headset-related software update info when Flamingo/Spoonbill is not paired with Charge Case
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the Poly Voyager Legend 50 or Poly Voyager Legend 30 headset is NOT paired with a Charge Case.
3. Power on the headset by pressing and holding the Power button until the LED indicator flashes.
4. Pair the headset with the Android device via Bluetooth settings if not already paired.
5. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
6. Observe the battery indicator displayed on the Home screen.
7. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to Settings.
8. Select Software Update from the Settings menu.
9. Observe the information displayed on the Software Update screen.
expected: Only the headset battery indicator is shown on the Home screen. In Settings > Software Update, only headset-related information (e.g., headset firmware version, headset serial number) is displayed. No charge case battery indicator or charge case-related information is shown.
